title: Burger King India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
company: Burger King India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Burger King India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Burger King India South Asia Partners in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Burger King India South Asia Partners:
Burger King India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Burger King India South Asia Partners!
